涼しい.mnemonics: Visualize 'soo-zoo-she' as someone saying 'soothe you, she' on a cool day.

冷たい.mnemonics: Think of 'tsumetai' as someone saying 'tsu, meaty' while shivering in the cold.

遅い.mnemonics: Imagine 'oh-soy' as someone saying 'oh soy!' when realizing they're late.

眠い.mnemonics: Visualize 'ne-moo-e' as someone saying 'ne-moo, eh?' when feeling sleepy.

簡単.mnemonics: Think of 'kan-tan' as someone saying 'can tan' easily.

かかる.mnemonics: Imagine 'ka-ka-roo' as a kangaroo taking a long time to jump ('ka') over a hurdle.

泊まる.mnemonics: Visualize 'tomaru' as someone saying 'tomorrow' while deciding to stay overnight.

なる.mnemonics: Think of 'narwhal' as someone transforming ('naru') into a magical creature.

決める.mnemonics: Imagine 'key-meh-roo' as someone deciding the key ('key') to solving a puzzle.

english: to stay home and do nothing
ごろごろする.mnemonics: Visualize 'goro-goro' as someone rolling ('goro') around lazily ('goro') on the floor.

旅行する.mnemonics: Think of 'ryokou suru' as someone shouting 'rock on!' before embarking on a journey.

練習する.mnemonics: Imagine 'renshuu suru' as someone saying 'run shoe, run' while practicing sports.

一番.mnemonics: Visualize 'ichi-ban' as someone saying 'itchy bun' to claim they have the best bun.

どっち・どちら.mnemonics: Think of 'dotchy' as someone asking 'dotchy?' to choose between two options.

速く.mnemonics: Imagine 'ha-yaku' as someone urging you to 'hurry up!'
